demographics.instructions: Please answer a few background questions before we begin.

questions.text: What is your age range?
What is your current role?
What is your primary area of study or work?
How often do you read academic papers?
When you read a new paper, what is your typical approach?

options.A: I usually read it thoroughly from start to finish
options.B: I usually skim first, then read selectively
options.C: I almost always skim without deep reading

paper1.title: Paper 1 Title (replace me)
paper1.taskInstructions: Use the paper to find the correct answers to the questions on the right. You may submit as many times as needed — your time and number of attempts are recorded. All multiple-choice questions must be answered correctly before you can proceed.

questions.text: REPLACE: Question 1 for paper 1?
REPLACE: Question 2 for paper 1?
REPLACE: Open-ended question for paper 1 (optional, does not block completion).

questionnaire.instructions: Please rate your experience reading this paper.

questions.text: I found it difficult to answer Question 1.
I found it difficult to answer Question 2.
Overall, how easy was it to skim this paper for the relevant information?
Any comments about reading this paper?

finalQuestionnaire.instructions: Please answer these final questions about your overall experience with the highlighting system.

questions.text: Overall, how helpful were the highlighted sentences for understanding the papers?
How confident are you in your overall understanding of the three papers?
How easy was it to identify the most important information in each paper?
To what extent did the highlights include repeated or already-known information?
I felt that important information was missing from the highlighted text:
I trusted the highlights to include the key ideas of the paper:
How easy was it to tell what was new versus repeated across the papers?
The highlights helped me focus on novel or important content:
How likely would you be to use a system like this in your own reading workflow?
What did you like most or least about the highlighting system?
Is there anything that felt missing, confusing, or unnecessary?
